transcript: Hi. Uh... this is Mike, how can I help you?
Yeah, I've got a series of real exotic photographs.
I've got a bunch of exotic photographs taken of myself.
Umm... this is just an all-girls strip club. Um... this isn't a [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chippendales Chippendales], or a... male dancer club.
No, it was like... there was some, uh... you know, I was in Europe in some of 'em.
Um... you might wanna, um... check somewhere else, 'cause we really don't really do that.
There's this one where I'm in a canoe. It's pretty neat.
Well, we... we really don't do that kind of stuff here. So you might wanna check somewhere else.
Uh, actually, Leather said I could bring 'em down.
Um... I don't think so, but you might wanna check somewhere else--
What... like... what... like... what? You keep saying that. Why don't you give me... why don't you just offer a solution, instead of just... you know... the status quo mentality.
Um... well, because I really don't know of any other...
...that offer male dancers... uh... because we strictly...
What you're saying is, like, a... is a...
...totally [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Darwinism Darwinian], uh... way of going about things.
What you're proposing is a complete Darwinian society. [snickering]
A Darwinian society. Do you know what [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Charles_Darwin Darwin] proposed?
Do I know? No. No, I don't know.
Well, then don't propose the Darwinian society. Because you have no idea what Darwin proposed. So don't even try to pull that bullshit... up... um... up on me.
Wha... uh... you know what, I'll settle this on open stage night, down at '''[http://www.quixotes.com/ Quixote's]. How's that sound?
What... um, I'm sorry. Say that again?
I'll settle this at open stage, partner. Quixote's, Thursday night.

Okay. Well, uh... you called up here, and you tried to offer... uh... yourself, to come up here and show pictures of yourself, and you're a male, and we do not accept that, and we do not accept any pictures of female... uhh... uh, nudity whatsoever. Uh... [unintelligible]
I don't accept your rhetoric. How does that sound?
Um, wha... I'm sorry, say that again?
[feedback] I don't accept your rhetoric. How does that grab ya?
Or jargon, or whatever it is.
What jargon? I'm sorry, I think you're drunk, sir, and I think you need to go. Bye bye.
I think your dogma's just wearing thin, partner.
